zh.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea是Robert At-Sea和Millicent的女兒，於1525年出生在英國肯特。她於1542年與Thomas Hawkins在英國英格蘭肯特布頓 武安德 布利安結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1553年8月20日在她的家鄉享年28歲，埋葬在英國肯特布頓-德-布利安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea是Robert At-Sea和Millicent的女儿，于1525年出生在英国肯特。她于1542年与Thomas Hawkins在英国英格兰肯特布頓 武安德 布利安结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1553年8月20日在她的家乡享年28岁，埋葬在英国肯特布頓-德-布利安。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea was born in 1525, in Kent, England as the daughter of Robert At-Sea and Millicent. She married Thomas Hawkins in 1542, in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 20 August 1553, in her hometown, at the age of 28, and was buried in Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea est née en 1525, à Kent, Angleterre, fille de Robert At-Sea et Millicent. Elle a épousé Thomas Hawkins en 1542, à Boughton under Blean, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 août 1553, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea wurde 1525 in Kent, England, als Tochter von Robert At-Sea und Millicent geboren. Sie hat 1542 in Boughton under Blean, Kent, England, United Kingdom Thomas Hawkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. August 1553 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea è nata il nel 1525 nel Kent, England come figlia di Robert At-Sea e Millicent. Lei sposato Thomas Hawkins nel 1542, nel Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1553, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Seaは1525年にイギリスケントでRobert At-SeaとMillicentの娘として生まれた。1542年にイギリスイギリスケントボウトン ウンダー ブリーンでThomas Hawkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1553年8月20日に故郷で28歳で死去し，イギリスケントボウトン-ウンデル-ブリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Of,Boughton Under Blean,Kent,Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인
ko.Of Nashe,Boughton Under Blean,Kent,Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea(은)는 1525년 영국 켄트에서 Robert At-Sea(와)과 Millicent의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 부그h턴 운더 블리인에서 Thomas Hawkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 8월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 부그h토-운더-블리인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea nasceu em 1525, em Kent, Inglaterra filha de Robert At-Sea e Millicent. Ela casou-se com Thomas Hawkins em 1542, em Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1553, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Of Nashe,Boughton Under Blean,Kent,Eng: боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea родилась в 1525 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert At-Sea и Millicent. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hawkins в 1542 г. в местности боугтон ундир блян, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 20 августа 1553 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности боугтон-ундир-блян, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Eleanor At-Sea nació en 1525, en Kent, Inglaterra como hija de Robert At-Sea y Millicent. Se casó con Thomas Hawkins en 1542, en Boughton under Blean, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1553, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Boughton-under-Blean, Kent, Inglaterra.
